name: Unified E2E: Admin CTO + Tier 2 Managed
description: Complete end-to-end provisioning: Admin CTO cluster on bare metal, platform stack deployment, BoltRun E2E verification, Agent Browser UI testing, and Client CTO provisioning via Tier 2 managed flow. Designed for unattended overnight operation.

adminCTO.name: admin-cto
adminCTO.purpose: Control plane - runs web app, controller, OpenBao, ArgoCD

clientCTO.name: client-cto-acme
clientCTO.purpose: Customer cluster - provisioned via BoltRun, connects back to Admin

cleanupProcedure.description: MANDATORY cleanup before starting fresh - run ALL steps
steps: 1. Delete Admin CTO servers via Latitude MCP: list servers, delete each one
2. Delete Client CTO servers if any exist
4. Remove WARP Connector tunnels from Cloudflare Zero Trust
8. Verify no orphaned resources in Latitude dashboard

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Tools Installed
userStories.description: Verify all required CLI tools are installed and accessible
acceptanceCriteria: argocd CLI is installed: which argocd
Installer binary exists: ls target/release/installer || cargo build --release -p installer

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Latitude API Access
userStories.description: Verify Latitude.sh API is accessible via MCP or direct curl
acceptanceCriteria: Latitude API key is set in environment
Can list projects via API (curl with auth header)
Can check server stock in target region (DAL)

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Talos MCP Access
userStories.description: Verify talos-mcp server is accessible
acceptanceCriteria: MCP server responds to health check

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Create Servers
userStories.description: Provision bare metal servers for Admin CTO control plane
acceptanceCriteria: MUST verify DAL region has sufficient stock BEFORE creating servers
ALL servers MUST be in DAL region (no multi-region)
Server IDs recorded in coordination state

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Create VLAN
userStories.description: Create private network for Admin CTO node-to-node communication
acceptanceCriteria: VLAN details recorded in coordination state

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Servers Ready
userStories.description: Wait for all Admin CTO servers to reach 'on' state
acceptanceCriteria: All servers reach 'on' status within 15 minutes
No servers stuck in 'off' or 'deploying' state
Server public IPs are assigned and recorded
GATE: Must pass before proceeding to Talos phase

userStories.title: Admin CTO: iPXE Boot Talos
userStories.description: Trigger Talos installation via iPXE on Admin CTO servers
acceptanceCriteria: iPXE reinstall triggered for all servers
Talos maintenance mode reached within 15 minutes

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Generate Talos Configs
userStories.description: Generate Talos machine configs for Admin CTO cluster
acceptanceCriteria: Firewall rules for WARP Connector included

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Apply Talos Configs
userStories.description: Apply machine configs to all Admin CTO nodes
acceptanceCriteria: Nodes reboot and install Talos to disk
All nodes reachable via talosctl after reboot
GATE: Talos API responding on all nodes

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Bootstrap Kubernetes
userStories.description: Bootstrap etcd and Kubernetes control plane on Admin CTO
acceptanceCriteria: kubectl get nodes returns control plane node

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Deploy Cilium CNI
userStories.description: Deploy Cilium as the CNI on Admin CTO
acceptanceCriteria: Cilium deployed via Helm with ClusterMesh support
Cilium agent pods running on all nodes

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Workers Join
userStories.description: Worker nodes join the Admin CTO cluster
acceptanceCriteria: All worker nodes appear in kubectl get nodes
GATE: All nodes Ready before proceeding

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Deploy ArgoCD
userStories.description: Deploy ArgoCD for GitOps management on Admin CTO
acceptanceCriteria: ArgoCD admin password retrieved and saved

userStories.title: Admin CTO: Apply App-of-Apps
userStories.description: Apply the app-of-apps manifest to deploy platform stack

userStories.title: Admin CTO: GitOps Sync Complete
userStories.description: All GitOps applications synced and healthy
acceptanceCriteria: GATE: GitOps baseline healthy before platform deploy

userStories.title: Platform: Deploy GHCR Secret
userStories.description: Create ghcr-secret for pulling container images
acceptanceCriteria: VERIFICATION: kubectl get secret ghcr-secret -n cto

userStories.title: Platform: Deploy CTO Secrets
userStories.description: Create cto-secrets with API keys for agent operation
acceptanceCriteria: Contains other required API keys (OPENAI, GEMINI, etc.)
VERIFICATION: kubectl get secret cto-secrets -n cto

userStories.title: Platform: Deploy Agent Controller
userStories.description: Deploy and verify agent-controller is running
acceptanceCriteria: Controller watches CodeRun and BoltRun CRDs
VERIFICATION: kubectl get pods -n cto | grep controller shows Running

userStories.title: Platform: Deploy Web App
userStories.description: Deploy web app with database and auth secrets
acceptanceCriteria: Web app accessible via ingress or port-forward
VERIFICATION: kubectl get pods -n cto | grep web shows Running

userStories.title: Platform: Verify Health
userStories.description: Verify all platform components are healthy
acceptanceCriteria: Web app responding to health check
GATE: Platform healthy before BoltRun testing

userStories.title: BoltRun: CRD Registered
userStories.description: Verify BoltRun CRD is registered and functional
acceptanceCriteria: VERIFICATION: kubectl get crd boltruns.cto.5dlabs.ai returns CRD
CRD has correct schema (tenantRef, taskType, provision config)

userStories.title: BoltRun: Controller Reconciliation
userStories.description: Verify controller watches and reconciles BoltRun resources
acceptanceCriteria: VERIFICATION: agent-controller pod is Running in cto namespace
VERIFICATION: kubectl get jobs -n cto-admin shows Job created
VERIFICATION: kubectl get pods -n cto-admin | grep bolt shows installer pod

userStories.title: BoltRun: Credential Injection
userStories.description: Verify credentials are injected into BoltRun pods
acceptanceCriteria: Secret mounted as env vars in installer pod
VERIFICATION: kubectl get secrets -n cto-admin | grep bolt

userStories.title: BoltRun: Progress Reporting
userStories.description: Verify BoltRun status updates show progress
acceptanceCriteria: VERIFICATION: kubectl get boltrun -n cto-admin -o yaml shows status
VERIFICATION: kubectl logs shows installer output

userStories.title: BoltRun: E2E Test Pass
userStories.description: Full E2E test of BoltRun provisioning flow
acceptanceCriteria: GATE: BoltRun E2E passes before UI testing

userStories.title: UI Testing: Install Agent Browser
userStories.description: Install Agent Browser for E2E UI automation
acceptanceCriteria: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/agent-browser OR use cursor-ide-browser MCP
Can open URLs and interact with pages

userStories.title: UI Testing: Navigate Onboarding
userStories.description: Navigate to managed onboarding page
acceptanceCriteria: Web app is running and accessible
Page loads with provider selection visible

userStories.title: UI Testing: Provider/Region/Size Selection
userStories.description: Complete provider, region, and size selection in UI
acceptanceCriteria: Select NYC as region (for Client CTO)

userStories.title: UI Testing: API Key Entry
userStories.description: Enter and validate API key in UI

userStories.title: UI Testing: Trigger Provisioning
userStories.description: Trigger BoltRun provisioning from UI
acceptanceCriteria: VERIFICATION: kubectl get boltrun -n cto-admin shows new BoltRun
GATE: BoltRun created before Client CTO provisioning

userStories.title: Client CTO: Servers Created
userStories.description: BoltRun creates Client CTO servers in NYC region
acceptanceCriteria: BoltRun installer runs stock check for NYC
Servers created in NYC region only
Server IDs visible in BoltRun status

userStories.title: Client CTO: Talos Installed
userStories.description: Talos installed on Client CTO servers

userStories.title: Client CTO: Cluster Ready
userStories.description: Client CTO Kubernetes cluster is operational

userStories.title: Connectivity: Deploy WARP Connector
userStories.description: Install Cloudflare WARP Connector on Client CTO
acceptanceCriteria: Connector establishes outbound connection to Cloudflare

userStories.title: Connectivity: Register Cloudflare Tunnel
userStories.description: Register Client CTO tunnel with Cloudflare Zero Trust
acceptanceCriteria: Tunnel created in Cloudflare Zero Trust
Routes configured for pod and service CIDRs

userStories.title: Connectivity: Configure ClusterMesh
userStories.description: Set up Cilium ClusterMesh peering
acceptanceCriteria: ClusterMesh API server exposed on both clusters
Peering established between Admin and Client CTO

userStories.title: Connectivity: L3 Ping Test
userStories.description: Verify pod-to-pod IP routing works
acceptanceCriteria: Test pod on Client CTO can ping Admin CTO pod IP
Test pod on Admin CTO can ping Client CTO pod IP
GATE: L3 connectivity before final verification

userStories.title: Connectivity: Global Services
userStories.description: Verify Cilium Global Services work
acceptanceCriteria: Global Service created on Client CTO

userStories.title: Verification: CodeRun Dispatch
userStories.description: Test CodeRun dispatch from Admin to Client CTO
acceptanceCriteria: CodeRun created on Admin CTO for acme tenant
CodeRun synced to Client CTO via ClusterMesh
Agent pod created on Client CTO

userStories.title: Verification: Status Sync
userStories.description: Verify status syncs back to Admin CTO
acceptanceCriteria: CodeRun status updates on Client CTO
Status syncs to Admin CTO within 30 seconds
Status includes: phase, output, completion time

userStories.title: Verification: Metrics Flow
userStories.description: Verify cluster metrics flow to Admin CTO
acceptanceCriteria: Metrics visible in Admin CTO monitoring

userStories.title: Verification: Full E2E Success
userStories.description: Final verification that entire flow works
acceptanceCriteria: Admin CTO running with all components
CodeRun can dispatch and return results
